page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A fast, memory-efficient, multiple genome orthology classifier.

A high performance tool to identify orthologs and paralogs across genomes.

SwiftOrtho is orthology analysis tool which identifies orthologs, paralogs and co-orthologs for genomes. It is a graph-based approach
